**Creative Director & Game Designer**

*📍 Turin, Italy*

## About Me

I make games and help teams make them well, from first idea to final release.

Graduated with honours from **[VFS Game Design](https://vfs.edu)**. <br>
Now running **[Doneref Studios](https://www.studios.doneref.com/)** out of Turin, currently deep in production on our first commercial title.

📩 guerrini.work@gmail.com

## What I Do

🎮 Game Design &nbsp;·&nbsp; ⚙️ Systems Design &nbsp;·&nbsp; 🧠 Concept Design
&nbsp;·&nbsp; 📖 Narrative Design &nbsp;·&nbsp; 🎬 Creative Direction &nbsp;·&nbsp; 👥 Team Management
